section.heading: Military museums and military education programs: cooperative agreement authority

subsection.heading: Use Authorized.—
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary concerned may enter into a cooperative agreement with a nonprofit entity for purposes related to—

paragraph.content: the support of a military educational institution program.

subsection.heading: Cooperative Agreement Described.—
subsection.content: For purposes of subsection (a), an authorized cooperative agreement is described in section 6305 of title 31, except that the use of a cooperative agreement by the Secretary concerned is limited to nonprofit entities.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 112–239, div. B, title XXVIII, § 2852(b)(1), Jan. 2, 2013, 126 Stat. 2161.)
